key_facts.fact: Agreement number is FCA-2025-0312
The agreement has an initial term of 12 months (September 1, 2025 to August 31, 2026)
The agreement auto-renews for successive 6-month periods unless 60 days' written notice of non-renewal is given
The daily rate is EUR 1,850.00 per consultant per day, exclusive of VAT
The total engagement is estimated at 185 consultant-days with a total estimated fee of EUR 342,250.00 exclusive of VAT
Invoices are submitted monthly by the 5th business day following month-end, with payment due within 30 calendar days
Late payment interest is 8 percentage points above the ECB base interest rate
Monthly travel expense cap is EUR 2,500.00 without prior written approval
Expense reimbursements paid to Friedrich Müller's account at Raiffeisenbank Oberösterreich, IBAN AT44 3400 0001 0827 4519
Confidentiality obligations survive for 3 years after termination
Attorney-client privileged note references potential acquisition of Danube Digital Consulting by AlpenTech (Project Edelweiss) with KPMG valuation of EUR 4.2-5.8 million
Work product becomes exclusive property of the Client upon full payment
Consultant retains ownership of general tools and methodologies with a non-exclusive, perpetual, royalty-free license to the Client
Termination for convenience requires 90 days' written notice
Termination for cause requires 30-day cure period for material breach
Force majeure termination is available after 60 continuous days
Liability is capped at total fees paid in the 12 months preceding the claim
Disputes are resolved by arbitration at VIAC (Vienna International Arbitral Centre) with a sole arbitrator, seat in Graz, in English
key_facts.source_section: Article 8: Governing Law and Dispute Resolution

key_facts.fact: Governing law is Austrian law, excluding CISG and Austrian conflict of laws rules
key_facts.source_section: Article 8: Governing Law and Dispute Resolution

key_facts.fact: The Client's customers have approximately 38 production lines across 5 manufacturing sites
Industrial sensor telemetry data amounts to approximately 1.8 terabytes per day
Training program targets 24 engineers with a minimum of 40 hours of instructor-led training
Key personnel cannot be replaced without prior written consent of the Client
Key personnel PII includes SV-Nr and passport numbers: Friedrich Müller (SV-Nr 3782 150673, Passport P 4821673), Bernhard Steindl (SV-Nr 5194 220885), Claudia Wallner (SV-Nr 6413 090791)

deliverables.title: Industrial Control Systems Assessment and Modernization Strategy
deliverables.description: Comprehensive assessment of 38 production lines across 5 manufacturing sites with detailed modernization roadmap; written report of no fewer than 80 pages.

deliverables.title: Predictive Maintenance Data Pipeline Architecture
deliverables.description: Modern data pipeline architecture for processing 1.8 TB/day of industrial sensor telemetry data, supporting real-time streaming from edge gateways, batch processing, and data quality monitoring.

deliverables.title: Edge-Deployed ML Integration Framework
deliverables.description: Framework for integrating ML models into industrial edge devices, including model serving on industrial PCs, monitoring dashboards, A/B testing, and rollback procedures for predictive maintenance and anomaly detection.

deliverables.title: Knowledge Transfer and Training Program
deliverables.description: Training program for 24 engineers: minimum 40 hours of instructor-led sessions, hands-on workshops, and written documentation covering all architectures and frameworks.

governing_law.arbitration_institution: Vienna International Arbitral Centre (VIAC) of the Austrian Federal Economic Chamber

summary: A 12-month framework consulting agreement (FCA-2025-0312) between AlpenTech GmbH (Client, Graz) and Danube Digital Consulting e.U. (Consultant, Linz), effective September 1, 2025. The Consultant will provide industrial control systems assessment across 38 production lines, predictive maintenance data pipeline architecture for 1.8 TB/day sensor data, edge-deployed ML integration framework, and knowledge transfer training for 24 engineers. Compensation is EUR 1,850 per consultant-day (estimated 185 days, EUR 342,250 total excl. VAT) with monthly invoicing and 30-day payment terms. The agreement includes 90-day termination for convenience, 30-day cure period for material breach, 3-year confidentiality survival, and is governed by Austrian law with VIAC arbitration in Graz. Contains attorney-client privileged information regarding a potential acquisition of Danube Digital Consulting by AlpenTech (Project Edelweiss, valuation EUR 4.2-5.8M). PII present includes SV-Nr, passport numbers, IBANs, home addresses, and personal phone numbers.
